name: Rhubarb-Strawberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Place rhubarb in a very large saucepan or Dutch oven.
2. Drain pineapple juice into the pan with the rhubarb, then bring to a boil. Cover and simmer for 2 minutes or until the rhubarb is tender.
3. Wash berries, remove caps, and crush them.
4. Combine with pineapple and rhubarb. Measure 3 1/2 cups into the same pan. Add sugar and mix well.
5. Over high heat, bring to a full rolling boil. Boil hard for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Remove from heat. Immediately add pectin, skimming off foam with a metal spoon. Ladle jam into hot jars.
7. Pour 1/8 inch hot paraffin over the tops. Cover with lids. Store in a cool, dry place.
